summary: C6: web UI — EdgeCard (two-passage), EdgeActions, EdgeReclassifySheet, screens/EdgeDeck, screens/EdgeFilter. Header/StatsDrawer integration so edge counts and queue status surface alongside tag counts.

resolution.note: EdgeCard/EdgeActions/EdgeReclassifySheet + EdgeDeck/EdgeFilter screens shipped. /api/edges* wired into the deck. HeaderBar gains tag/edges nav and switches pending count source by route. Queue.tsx handles polymorphic context.kind union. Smoke-tested mixed-batch flow end-to-end against shadow DB. Web build clean (218KB).
